---
title: "Software"
---

::: {.page-lede}
R packages for political science and public policy research, published on CRAN and GitHub.
:::

:::: {.software-card}
::: {.pkg-body}

### pinochet

[Data about the victims of the Pinochet regime, 1973--1990 -- demographic details, type of violence, and geographic coordinates.]{.pkg-desc}

[With Lucas Mingardi and Robert McDonnell.]{.pkg-meta}

::: {.software-links}

[Website](http://danilofreire.github.io/pinochet){.primary}
[GitHub](https://github.com/danilofreire/pinochet)
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=pinochet)

:::
:::
::::

:::: {.software-card}
::: {.pkg-body}

### congressbr

[Downloads, unpacks, and tidies legislative data from the Brazilian Federal Senate and Chamber of Deputies -- legislators, bills, votes, and parliamentary activity.]{.pkg-desc}

[With Robert McDonnell and Guilherme Duarte. *Latin American Research Review*, 2019.]{.pkg-meta}

::: {.software-links}

[GitHub](https://github.com/RobertMyles/congressbr){.primary}
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=congressbr)
[Paper](https://doi.org/10.25222/larr.447)

:::
:::
::::

:::: {.software-card}
::: {.pkg-body}

### prisonbrief

[Returns tidy data from the World Prison Brief website -- prison populations, occupancy rates, and demographic breakdowns.]{.pkg-desc}

[With Robert McDonnell. *Journal of Open Source Software*, 2018.]{.pkg-meta}

::: {.software-links}

[Website](http://danilofreire.github.io/prisonbrief){.primary}
[GitHub](https://github.com/danilofreire/prisonbrief)
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=prisonbrief)
[Paper](https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.00361)

:::
:::
::::
